search_document:
User Request: Supplier performance.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Supplier Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
Title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
Title: Total Orders by Supplier
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders fulfilled by suppliers
Title: Average Delivery Time by Supplier
Type: chart
Description: Average time taken for deliveries from each supplier
Title: Supplier Order Fulfillment Rate
Type: kpi
Description: Percentage of orders fulfilled on time by suppliers

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", SUM(od."UnitPrice" * od."Quantity" * (1 - od."Discount")) AS "TotalRevenue" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" GROUP BY s."CompanyName"

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", SUM(od."UnitPrice" * od."Quantity" * (1 - od."Discount")) AS "TotalRevenue" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" GROUP BY s."CompanyName" ORDER BY "TotalRevenue" DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Orders by Supplier
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders fulfilled by suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", COUNT(DISTINCT o."OrderID") AS "TotalOrders" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" JOIN "Orders" o ON od."OrderID" = o."OrderID" GROUP BY s."CompanyName"

sql_queries.title: Average Delivery Time by Supplier
sql_queries.description: Average time taken for deliveries from each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", AVG(julianday(o."ShippedDate") - julianday(o."OrderDate")) AS "AvgDeliveryTime" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" JOIN "Orders" o ON od."OrderID" = o."OrderID" WHERE o."ShippedDate" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s."CompanyName"

sql_queries.title: Supplier Order Fulfillment Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage of orders fulfilled on time by suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", (SUM(CASE WHEN o."ShippedDate" <= o."RequiredDate" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(o."OrderID")) * 100 AS "FulfillmentRate" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" JOIN "Orders" o ON od."OrderID" = o."OrderID" WHERE o."ShippedDate" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s."CompanyName"
